nasb.text: You shall divide it for an inheritance, each one equally with the other; for I swore to give it to your forefathers, and this land shall fall to you as an inheritance.

esv.text: And you shall divide equally what I swore to give to your fathers. This land shall fall to you as your inheritance.

cnv.text: 你們要均分這地為業，因為我曾舉手要把這地賜給你們的列祖，這地必歸給你們為業。

ccb.text: 其他各支派都要均分，因为我曾起誓将这地方赐给你们祖先。这地方必成为你们的产业。
